---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an idea — please read the note below first
labels: enhancement
---

> **A heads-up before you write:** KanBlam stays deliberately small — five
> views over one task store, no wiki, no Gantt, no enterprise theatre. Ideas
> that sharpen that shape have a good shot; ideas that broaden it usually
> get a friendly no. (See `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` → Design philosophy.)

**The problem** — what are you trying to do that KanBlam makes hard?

**Your proposed solution**

**Alternatives you've considered** (including "do it outside KanBlam")
